series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes “Drivers with Excessive Tickets Excluded from Registration (DETER) Clearance” (BMV 5625) forms faxed in from Parking Violation Bureaus (PVB) and mailed in from deputy registrar agencies, as well as, “Failure to Pay Court Ordered Vehicle Registration Block” (BMV 1150) and “Notices of Judgment” (BMV 1163) issued to registrants upon notification from a PVB of disability parking violations or three or more outstanding parking violations (Revised Code 4521.10).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records are stored on site with BMV’s Vehicle Information Services for six (6) months from date of issuance, which after time records will be sent to the warehouse for seven (7) additional months. ; Electronic: Retain records for thirteen (13) months., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
